ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 77% wholegrain brown rice, 16% olive oil, 7% seasoning (natural flavourings, salt, stabiliser: potassium chloride, maltodextrin, 16% red pepper, sugar, rice flour, onion, 1,2% red chilli pepper, garlic, acidity regulators: calcium phosphates, citric acid, colour: paprika extract, stabiliser: gum arabic),
